title: Music Library Track Timing
description: Sidecar timing manifest for a track in `music_library/`. When production_proposal.music_strategy == 'library_locked', the asset-director picks a track from music_library/ whose sidecar declares structural moments (drop_seconds, downbeats) compatible with the bible's tension_peak_at_seconds and intensity_curve. This is the only way to achieve bar-precise music sync — text-to-music models do not honor timestamp constraints in prompts.

track_file.description: Relative path from music_library/ to the audio file (e.g. 'ambient_dawn.mp3', 'cinematic_build.wav').

duration_seconds.description: Full track duration. Asset-director compares this against scene_plan.total_duration_seconds to decide whether to trim, loop, or skip the track.

bpm.description: Tempo in beats per minute. Optional. Used by lib.beat_detector when search_align strategy is active.

drop_seconds.description: Timestamps of bass drops or climactic moments within the track, in seconds. Asset-director picks the closest entry to production_bible.narrative.tension_peak_at_seconds and trims/pads the track so the chosen drop lands at the target time.

downbeats.description: Bar-1 downbeat timestamps in seconds. Optional. Used to align cuts and shutter clicks to the music's metric grid (match_cut_chain in scene_plan).

arc_shape.description: Coarse arc descriptor. Asset-director matches this against bible.narrative.pacing_model. 'rising' / 'slow_burn' fit escalating intensity_curves; 'wave' fits wave; 'punchy' fits punchy.

genre_tags.description: Free-form genre / mood tags ('ambient', 'cinematic', 'piano', 'orchestral', 'electronic', 'lofi'). Asset-director uses these for soft matching against bible.audio.music_direction.genre_direction.

license.description: License declaration ('CC0', 'Pixabay License', 'commercial-use', 'personal-only', 'royalty-free'). Asset-director refuses to use tracks declared 'personal-only' for ad-video pipelines.

notes.description: Free-form note for the human curator (origin, why this track was added, sync hints).
